name: Agent Run
description: Structure documentation for a Restack AI agent execution run

fields.name: runId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the agent run, prefixed with 'run_'

fields.name: input
fields.description: Input parameters passed when scheduling the agent

fields.name: output
fields.description: Result returned by the agent on completion

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error message if the run failed
